title: Abstract Fluid Motion
summary: Slow swirling liquid color in macro - hypnotic abstract motion design.
prompt: An ultra-slow macro shot of vivid liquid colors swirling and folding into each other - magenta, electric blue, gold, and emerald flowing in mesmerizing fluid patterns. Crisp surface tension, droplets pulling and stretching. Black backdrop. Studio-strobe lighting catches every ripple. Hypnotic motion-design loop, perfect for backgrounds and intros.
